intervention.label: 30-Second Gratitude
intervention.instructions: Name one thing you're grateful for.

stateMachine.templateReply: Okay, simpler — A quick 30-second gratitude keeps you in this groove. Name one thing you're grateful for. Want to start?

coach.reply: Got it, totally understand. How about just 30 seconds? Name one thing you're grateful for right now. That's it. Quick way to lock in how you're feeling.

tier2.rationale: Appropriately negotiates a shorter alternative after user declines, no biometric numbers cited in non-greeting state, tone is supportive and concise.

intervention.label: Physiological Sigh
intervention.instructions: Two short inhales, one long exhale.

stateMachine.templateReply: Okay, simpler — Physiological Sigh: Two short inhales, one long exhale. 30 seconds. Doable?

coach.reply: Got it — let's keep it super quick. Try the Physiological Sigh: two short inhales through your nose, then one long exhale. Takes 30 seconds. Want me to guide you?

tier2.rationale: Appropriately negotiates by offering a shorter alternative after user declines due to time, no biometric numbers cited, tone fits negotiating state.
